extension.description: The ultimate productivity tool to automatically manage SideBar and Panel visibility.
config.title: Auto Hide configuration
config.enabled: Global switch to enable or disable all Auto Hide Plus features.
config.hideDelay: Delay in milliseconds before hiding the SideBar or Panel.
config.excludeLanguages: List of language IDs that should NOT trigger auto-hide (e.g. 'markdown', 'json').
config.hideOnFocusLost: Automatically hide SideBars and Panel when VS Code loses focus.
config.autoHideIdleTimeout: Hide SideBar and Panel after X seconds of inactivity (0 to disable).
config.autoHideRightSideBar: Hide the right SideBar when the user clicks into a text editor.
config.autoHideLeftSideBar: Hide the left SideBar when the user clicks into a text editor.
config.autoHidePanel: Hide the Panel (output, terminal, etc.) when the user clicks into a text editor.
config.autoHideReferences: Hide the References panel ('Go to References') when the user clicks into a text editor.
config.hideOnOpen: Hide the SideBar and Panel when VSCode first opens.
config.hideRightSideBarWhenDebug: Hide the right SideBar when the user clicks into a text editor in debug mode.
config.hideLeftSideBarWhenDebug: Hide the left SideBar when the user clicks into a text editor in debug mode.
config.hidePanelWhenDebug: Hide the Panel when the user clicks into a text editor in debug mode.
command.toggleEnabled: Toggle Auto Hide Ultimate Global Switch
command.toggleAutoHideRightSideBar: Toggle AutoHide Right SideBar for Current Workspace
command.toggleAutoHideLeftSideBar: Toggle AutoHide Left SideBar for Current Workspace
command.toggleAutoHidePanel: Toggle AutoHide Panel for Current Workspace
command.toggleAutoHideReferences: Toggle AutoHide References for Current Workspace
command.toggleHideOnOpen: Toggle AutoHide SideBars and Panel when VSCode first opens
command.toggleHideLeftSideBarWhenDebug: Toggle AutoHide left SideBar when debug mode for Current Workspace
command.toggleHideRightSideBarWhenDebug: Toggle AutoHide right SideBar when debug mode for Current Workspace
command.toggleHidePanelWhenDebug: Toggle AutoHide Panel when debug mode for Current Workspace
